description_long: This is a modern, mid-century inspired sofa upholstered in a light blue fabric with a distinctive grid-tufted pattern across both the seat and backrest. The sofa features a continuous, high backrest and armrests that flare outward at sharp angles, creating a bold geometric silhouette. The seat and back are deeply cushioned, with the tufting forming a series of evenly spaced, indented squares for added texture and comfort. The sofa stands on four slender, tapered wooden legs that are slightly splayed, giving it an elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery appears to be a woven textile, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam padding. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, lobbies, or stylish outdoor communal areas.
description: A light blue, grid-tufted sofa with flared armrests, high backrest, and slender wooden legs, featuring a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, grid-tufted seat and backrest, and the dramatic outward flare of the armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angled profile of the armrest and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the flared armrest and the sofa's elevated stance on tapered legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions with uniform, deep grid tufting; all cushions are attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Flared, high armrests integrated into the sofa's frame, rising at sharp outward angles from the seat and matching the backrest height; no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, tapered wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly splayed outward; legs are exposed and have a dark brown finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a straight top edge and deep grid tufting; seamlessly integrated with the armrests for a unified look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light blue fabric with a uniform, grid-tufted pattern creating a quilted, textured surface; no additional decorative stitching or patterns.
